title: anastatica littoralis
intro: Anastatica littoralis, also known as the resurrection plant, is a succulent species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This remarkable plant is able to survive in harsh conditions, such as extreme heat and drought, by rolling up its leaves and entering a state of dormancy, hence its name. The medicinal properties of Anastatica littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against certain types of bacteria. In herbal preparations, Anastatica littoralis is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and promote coughing up mucus.
